\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt <}{\tt !}{\tt -}{\tt -}\  \parbox[t]{0.85\textwidth}{\ \centerline{\bf Towers of Hanoi --- PHP Edition}} \rm\mc \ {\tt -}{\tt -}{\tt >}
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt <}{\tt !}{\tt -}{\tt -}\ 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc \ \begin{quote}
\noindent
This PHP script computes the solution to the Towers of Hanoi
puzzle server-side and renders the result as an HTML table.
The recursive algorithm requires exactly $2^n - 1$ moves to
transfer $n$ discs from one pole to another.  Run with
{\tt php hanoi.php > output.html} or serve via a web server.
\end{quote} 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc \ {\tt -}{\tt -}{\tt >}
\tt\mc

\mbox{}{\tt <}\textbf{html}{\tt\mc \ }lang={\tt "}ja{\tt "}{\tt >}

\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\mc \ }{\tt *} ハノイの塔 --- PHP版
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\mc \ }{\tt *} サーバーサイドで再帰的に解を計算し、
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\mc \ }{\tt *} HTML テーブルとして出力する
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\mc \ }\rm\mc \ {\tt *}{\tt /}
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\$}NUM{\tt\_}DISCS{\tt\mc \ }={\tt\mc \ }4;{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\rm\mc // \ ディスクの枚数 \hfill
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\$}moves{\tt\mc \ }={\tt\mc \ }\textbf{array}();{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\rm\mc // \ 操作手順の配列 \hfill
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc // \ {\bf 再帰的解法} \hfill
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc // \ $n$ 枚のディスクを {\tt \$from} から
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc // \    {\tt \$to} へ {\tt \$via} を経由して移動 \hfill
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\textbf{function}{\tt\mc \ }hanoi({\tt\$}n,{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}from,{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}to,{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}via){\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'173}

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }global{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}moves;

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\textbf{if}{\tt\mc \ }({\tt\$}n{\tt\mc \ }{\tt <}={\tt\mc \ }0){\tt\mc \ }\textbf{return};

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }hanoi({\tt\$}n{\tt\mc \ }{\tt -}{\tt\mc \ }1,{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}from,{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}via,{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}to);{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\rm\mc // \ 上 $n-1$ 枚を退避 \hfill
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}moves[]{\tt\mc \ }={\tt\mc \ }\textbf{array}({\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\rm\mc // \ 最大ディスクを移動 \hfill
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }'disc'{\tt\mc \ }={\tt >}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}n,

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }'from'{\tt\mc \ }={\tt >}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}from,

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }'to'{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }={\tt >}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}to

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ });

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }hanoi({\tt\$}n{\tt\mc \ }{\tt -}{\tt\mc \ }1,{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}via,{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}to,{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}from);{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\rm\mc // \ 退避分を目的地へ \hfill
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\char'175}

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc // \ {\bf 移動回数の計算} \hfill
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc // \ [問題] この関数が $2^n - 1$ を返すことを
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc // \    確かめよ。 \hfill
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\textbf{function}{\tt\mc \ }countMoves({\tt\$}n){\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'173}

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\textbf{if}{\tt\mc \ }({\tt\$}n{\tt\mc \ }=={\tt\mc \ }0){\tt\mc \ }\textbf{return}{\tt\mc \ }0;

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\textbf{return}{\tt\mc \ }1{\tt\mc \ }+{\tt\mc \ }2{\tt\mc \ }*{\tt\mc \ }countMoves({\tt\$}n{\tt\mc \ }{\tt -}{\tt\mc \ }1);

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\char'175}

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt /}{\tt *}\  実行 \rm\mc \ {\tt *}{\tt /}
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}hanoi({\tt\$}NUM{\tt\_}DISCS,{\tt\mc \ }'A',{\tt\mc \ }'C',{\tt\mc \ }'B');

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\$}expected{\tt\mc \ }={\tt\mc \ }countMoves({\tt\$}NUM{\tt\_}DISCS);

\noindent
\mbox{}?{\tt >}

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt <}\textbf{p}{\tt\mc \ }class={\tt "}summary{\tt "}{\tt >}

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }Discs:{\tt\mc \ }{\tt <}?php{\tt\mc \ }\textbf{echo}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}NUM{\tt\_}DISCS;{\tt\mc \ }?{\tt >}{\tt\mc \ }|

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }Moves:{\tt\mc \ }{\tt <}?php{\tt\mc \ }\textbf{echo}{\tt\mc \ }count({\tt\$}moves);{\tt\mc \ }?{\tt >}{\tt\mc \ }|

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }Expected:{\tt\mc \ }{\tt <}?php{\tt\mc \ }\textbf{echo}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}expected;{\tt\mc \ }?{\tt >}

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(2{\tt <}\textbf{sup}{\tt >}{\tt <}?php{\tt\mc \ }\textbf{echo}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}NUM{\tt\_}DISCS;{\tt\mc \ }?{\tt >}{\tt <}/\textbf{sup}{\tt >}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt -}{\tt\mc \ }1)

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt <}/\textbf{p}{\tt >}

\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt <}\textbf{th}{\tt >}To{\tt <}/\textbf{th}{\tt >}

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt <}\textbf{td}{\tt >}{\tt <}?php{\tt\mc \ }\textbf{echo}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}m['disc'];{\tt\mc \ }?{\tt >}{\tt <}/\textbf{td}{\tt >}

\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\rm\mc // \ \centerline{\bf JavaScript Section}
